op.text: Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain; wore walking boot until Thursday 2025-05-01; as of 2025-05-24, cleared by physical therapist for light jogging (twenty minutes, flat ground, every other day); completed first jog on morning of 2025-05-24 along the esplanade

[as of 2025-05-24] Has decided not to pursue Lakefront Marathon in October 2025; described the decision as 'made peace with that' and said 'the ankle taught me something about not white-knuckling timelines'; current goal is to run pain-free by fall without re-injury; may sign up for marathon again next year

Sam accepted the Perception team lead role at the Austin robotics startup with a remote work arrangement from Portland; starts June 2025; will visit Austin approximately one week every couple months; Dana described the negotiation as 'he gave something up too — the in-person team, the new city adventure' and said she believes the trade is good for him 'about eighty-five percent'; as of 2025-05-24, Sam has built out the spare room as remote office (three monitors, foam panels); starts in a couple weeks from 2025-05-24; Dana described him as 'nervous-excited'
